regimens.name: Awaken Force Sensitivity
regimens.targets: One willing ally who does not possess the Force Sensitivity Feat.

regimens.name: Eyes of the Force
regimens.requirements: A two-dimensional image display and an assistant.

regimens.name: Oxygen Bottle
regimens.requirements: A glass bottle with a vac-seal stopper.

regimens.name: Telekinetic Practice
regimens.requirements: A deep bowl and a polished stone orb.

regimens.name: Sparring Practice
regimens.requirements: Lightsaber (or Training Lightsaber) and a sparring partner.

regimens.name: Training Remote
regimens.requirements: Lightsaber, Training Remote, and a Helmet with a blast shield.

regimens.name: Vo'ren's First Cadence
regimens.requirements: Lightsaber, 19 wax cylinders, and 190 ball bearings.

regimens.name: Vo'ren's Second Cadence
regimens.requirements: Lightsaber, 72 wax cylinders, and 2,701 ball bearings.

regimens.name: Vo'ren's Third Cadence
regimens.requirements: Lightsaber, 180 wax cylinders, and 16,290 ball bearings.

notes: Exact regimen language supplied by the user is now represented in the data authority and pack descriptions.
Each regimen has structured time, target, requirements, Use the Force check data, DC tiers, and structured benefit metadata.
No bonuses are applied to actors yet. Known regimens and active regimen application still need the future Force Regimen Mastery picker/level-up step and Force tab UI.
data/force-regimens.json and packs/forceregimens.db are both written as one JSON object per line.
